summary: Frontend-only regression test for frozen nav/filter-bar + Locations POS card metrics. All 5 acceptance criteria passed.

location_card_6_labels.sample_text_card_1: Online - Shop Zetu ... Orders 10 Units 16 Returns KES 2,500 ABV KES 3,890 ASP KES 2,431 MSI 1.60
location_card_6_labels.sample_text_card_2: Vivo Meru ... Orders 1 Units 1 Returns KES 0 ABV KES 4,500 ASP KES 4,500 MSI 1.00

critical_code_review_comments: All sticky/fixed layout fixes correctly applied: Sidebar.jsx removed `relative` from <nav>; mobile-menu now fixed at top-[48px] sm:top-[56px]; FilterBar.jsx uses !top/!left/!right bang-prefix; index.css .sticky-nav has position/top/left/right all !important; App.js main has pt-[116px] sm:pt-[128px] padding-top. Visually verified at 1440x900 viewport.
Locations page POS cards correctly render the 3x2 metric grid (Orders/Units/Returns row and ABV/ASP/MSI row) per card.

Minor: On 1440x900 initial Overview load, the page sometimes shows 'Aggregating group KPIs...' spinner for 5-8s before KPIs populate — not a bug, just loading latency. Tests waited 8-12s to accommodate.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frozen nav/filter regression verified passed on iteration 13. Viewport 1440x900 uses desktop breakpoint so filter bar top=56px (sm breakpoint). KPI data loads async (~6-8s) via /api/kpis — always wait after overview-page appears before asserting numeric content. Use textContent.toLowerCase().includes(...) for label matching since .eyebrow class applies text-transform:uppercase.
rca_of_the_issue: Not applicable — all fixes working as intended.
